stemHtml: Changes to an IFR or controlled VFR flight plan must be reported as soon as practicable. Which of the following is an example of a significant reportable change?

options.a: The total number of persons on board is incorrect at departure.
options.b: The time estimate to the next reporting point changes by 2 minutes.
options.c: The aircraft deviates more than 3 NM from the track.
